title: 5/11〜5/15 Weekly Market Report

top5_themes.theme: サイバーセキュリティ

bot5_themes.theme: 観光・ホテル・レジャー

report:
## Market Overview (Week of May 12–16)

Mixed week. 34 of 67 themes advanced, average return -0.23%. BOJ commentary on rate normalization pace added uncertainty.

---

## Rising Themes

### 🥇 #1: Banking & Finance (+4.2%)
BOJ governor reaffirmed normalization path. NIM expansion expectations drove MUFG and SMFG higher.

### 🥈 #2: Insurance (+3.8%)
Long-term yield increases enhanced investment return expectations.

### 🥉 #3: National Resilience (+3.1%)
New infrastructure spending plans announced.

---

## Falling Themes

Growth themes (SaaS, Generative AI, Space & Satellite) declined as rate-sensitive valuation headwinds intensified.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

BOJ timing uncertainty is creating a genuine sector rotation from growth/AI to value/financials. Classic late-cycle rotation. Recommendation: maintain AI/tech exposure but add banking/insurance as a hedge.

> **Disclaimer**: For informational purposes only. All investment decisions are your sole responsibility.
